prompt: A lunar eclipse casting a vibrant red hue on the moon, surrounded by shimmering stars.
prompt_refined: A highly detailed, photorealistic image depicting a total lunar eclipse. The moon glows with a striking, vibrant red hue, positioned prominently against the vast, inky blackness of the night sky. Thousands of shimmering, distinct stars are scattered profusely around the moon, creating a captivating celestial display.
objects: Striking, vibrant red hue on the moon
